mapper.sql: A.NWHOIS_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SWHOISREQUESTID, A.SAPPLICATIONNAME, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR, A.NLAST_ADDR, A.NCNT , A.SREQUEST_CD, A.SWHOISRESULT_CD, A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG, A.SKRNICMEMBER_ID , A.SISP_NM, A.SSAID, A.SLLNM, A.SNET_NM , A.SSCRETE_YN, A.SUSERORGGB, A.SNETTYPE, A.SSERVICEGB , A.SSVCLOC, A.SHOSTNOW, A.SUSEDTLNOW, A.SHOST6MONTH , A.SUSEDTL6MONTH, A.SHOST12MONTH, A.SUSEDTL12MONTH, A.SSVCCOMMNET , A.SREMARK, A.DSEND_DT, A.DRECEIPT_DT, A.DRECEIPTOK_DT , A.DREPLY_DT, A.DREGOK_DT, A.SKRNICNO, A.SKRNICORGCODE , A.SOLD_NET, A.SOLD_TOT_SUBNET, A.SOLD_TOT_HOST, A.SOLD_COMMENT , A.SNET_PLAN, A.STOT_SUBNET, A.STOT_HOST, A.SSVCNETWORK , A.SCITY, A.SCCLASSIP, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, NVL(A.SIP_TYPE, 'STATIC') AS SIP_TYPE
mapper.select:
SELECT
, REQ_CD.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_NM , TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_NM , (CASE WHEN STRPOS(A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG, '[2306]') > 0 AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '03' AND A.SREQUEST_CD = '03' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS DEL_YN , BIF.UF_NEW_WHOIS_RTN_TYPE(A.NWHOIS_SEQ) AS TYPE , BIF.UF_NEW_WHOIS_DB_MATCH('DB_MATCH_YN', A.NWHOIS_SEQ) AS DB_MATCH_YN FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD REQ_CD , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_TRANS_STATUS_CD TRANS_CD
AND A.SREQUEST_CD = REQ_CD.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A

SELECT , A.RNUM , A.SORGNAME , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , (CASE WHEN A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD = '01' THEN 'WHOIS 전송 대기' WHEN A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD = '02' THEN 'WHOIS 전송' WHEN A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD = '03' THEN 'WHOIS 반송' WHEN A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD = '04' THEN 'WHOIS 등록완료' ELSE 'WHOIS 전송완료' END) AS SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_NM , A.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_NM , (CASE WHEN STRPOS(A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG, '[2306]') > 0 AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '03' AND A.SREQUEST_CD = '03' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS DEL_YN , (CASE WHEN NVL(A.STRANSKIND, 'SYSTEM') = 'SYSTEM' THEN '시스템 입력' WHEN NVL(A.STRANSKIND, 'ADMIN') = 'ADMIN' THEN '관리자 입력' WHEN NVL(A.STRANSKIND, 'USER') = 'USER' THEN '사용자 입력' ELSE '시스템 입력' END ) AS STRANSKIND , A.STARGET_YN , (NVL(A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, '') || '-' || NVL(A.SSVC_GROUP_NM, '') || '-' || NVL(A.SSVC_OBJ_NM, '')) AS NODE_NM , TO_CHAR(A.DMODIFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SMODIFY_DT
FROM ( SELECT , ROWNUM RNUM , A.SORGNAME , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD , A.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_NM , A.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_NM , A.STRANSKIND , A.STARGET_YN FROM ( SELECT
, B.SORGNAME , ASSIGN.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , LINE.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , NODE.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , NODE.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , OFFICE.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , OFFICE.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , REQ_CD.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_NM , TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD , TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_NM , A.STRANSKIND , (CASE WHEN TT.NWHOIS_SEQ IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'TARGET' END) AS STARGET_YN
FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A
, BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD ASSIGN , MST.TB_LVL_MST LVL , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LINE , MST.TB_LVL_CD NODE , MST.TB_LVL_CD OFFICE , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD REQ_CD , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_TRANS_STATUS_CD TRANS_CD , ( SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSAID , A.SNET_NM , C.SSAID , C.SNETNAME FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B , BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER C WHERE 1=1 AND B.PIP_PREFIX(+) = A.PIP_PREFIX AND B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001', 'IA0002', 'IA0003', 'IA0004') AND C.SSAID(+) = A.SSAID ) TT
AND A.SSAID = B.SSAID(+) AND ASSIGN.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LVL.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND LVL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LINE.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND LVL.SSVC_GROUP_CD = NODE.SLVL_CD(+) AND LVL.SSVC_OBJ_CD = OFFICE.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SREQUEST_CD = REQ_CD.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD AND TT.NWHOIS_SEQ(+) = A.NWHOIS_SEQ
AND B.SORGNAME like '%' || #{sorgname, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND (( A.NFIRST_ADDR >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND A.NLAST_ADDR <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ) OR ( A.NFIRST_ADDR <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND A.NLAST_ADDR >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ))
AND (CASE WHEN TT.NWHOIS_SEQ IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'TARGET' END) = #{sTargetYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY NVL(A.DMODIFY_DT, A.DCREATE_DT) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A
, BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD ASSIGN , MST.TB_LVL_MST LVL , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LINE , MST.TB_LVL_CD NODE , MST.TB_LVL_CD OFFICE , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD REQ_CD , BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_TRANS_STATUS_CD TRANS_CD , ( SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSAID , A.SNET_NM , C.SSAID , C.SNETNAME FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B , BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER C WHERE 1=1 AND B.PIP_PREFIX(+) = A.PIP_PREFIX AND B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001', 'IA0002', 'IA0003', 'IA0004') AND C.SSAID(+) = A.SSAID ) TT
AND A.SSAID = B.SSAID(+) AND ASSIGN.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LVL.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND LVL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LINE.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND LVL.SSVC_GROUP_CD = NODE.SLVL_CD(+) AND LVL.SSVC_OBJ_CD = OFFICE.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SREQUEST_CD = REQ_CD.SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = TRANS_CD.SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD AND TT.NWHOIS_SEQ(+) = A.NWHOIS_SEQ
AND B.SORGNAME like '%' || #{sorgname, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND (( A.NFIRST_ADDR >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND A.NLAST_ADDR <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ) OR ( A.NFIRST_ADDR <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND A.NLAST_ADDR >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ))
AND (CASE WHEN TT.NWHOIS_SEQ IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'TARGET' END) = #{sTargetYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN SWHOISRESULT_CD = '01' THEN SWHOISRESULT_CD END) AS TRANS_WAIT, COUNT(CASE WHEN SWHOISRESULT_CD = '02' THEN SWHOISRESULT_CD END) AS TRANS, COUNT(CASE WHEN SWHOISRESULT_CD = '03' THEN SWHOISRESULT_CD END) AS FAIL, COUNT(CASE WHEN SWHOISRESULT_CD = '04' THEN SWHOISRESULT_CD END) AS REGISTERED, COUNT(CASE WHEN SWHOISRESULT_CD = '05' THEN SWHOISRESULT_CD END) AS TRANS_OK FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS
SELECT SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD, SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_NM FROM BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_TRANS_STATUS_CD ORDER BY SWHOIS_TRAN_STATUS_CD
SELECT SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD, SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_NM FROM BIF.V_TB_WHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SWHOIS_REQUEST_TYPE_CD
SELECT SCITY FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS WHERE SCITY IS NOT NULL AND SCITY != '' AND SCITY != '**' GROUP BY SCITY

SELECT A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.SAPPLICATIONNAME , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.NCNT , A.SREQUEST_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG , A.SKRNICMEMBER_ID , A.SISP_NM , A.SSAID , A.SLLNM , A.SNET_NM , A.SSCRETE_YN , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SHOSTNOW , A.SUSEDTLNOW , A.SHOST6MONTH , A.SUSEDTL6MONTH , A.SHOST12MONTH , A.SUSEDTL12MONTH , A.SSVCCOMMNET , A.SREMARK , A.DSEND_DT , A.DRECEIPT_DT , A.DRECEIPTOK_DT , A.DREPLY_DT , A.DREGOK_DT , A.SKRNICNO , A.SKRNICORGCODE , A.SOLD_NET , A.SOLD_TOT_SUBNET , A.SOLD_TOT_HOST , A.SOLD_COMMENT , A.SNET_PLAN , A.STOT_SUBNET , A.STOT_HOST , A.SSVCNETWORK , A.SCITY , A.SCCLASSIP , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SIP_TYPE , B.SNETNAME , B.SORGNAME , B.SADDR , NVL(B.SADDR_DETAIL, ' ') AS SADDR_DETAIL, B.SZIPCODE , B.SEORGNAME , B.SEADDR , NVL(B.SEADDR_DETAIL, ' ') AS SEADDR_DETAIL, B.SADM_NAME , B.SADM_ORGNAME , B.SADM_ADDR , B.SADM_ADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_ZIPCODE , B.SADM_ENAME , B.SADM_EORGNAME , B.SADM_EADDR , B.SADM_EADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_PHONE , B.SADM_DPPHONE , B.SADM_FAX , B.SADM_EMAIL , B.SFLAG , B.SADDRSEQ , B.SSERIALNO , B.SADM_SERIALNO , B.SECITY , B.SORGTYPE , B.SCUSTNAME FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A LEFT JOIN BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B ON B.SSAID = A.SSAID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.NWHOIS_SEQ = #{nwhoisSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY A.NWHOIS_SEQ

SELECT B.SCUSTNAME AS SORGNAME , D.ROADADDRTEXT AS SADDR , D.ZIPCODE AS SZIPCODE FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B ON B.SSAID = SPLIT_PART(A.SSAID, '-', 1) AND B.PIP_PREFIX = A.PIP_PREFIX LEFT JOIN BIF.TB_SVCMST C ON C.SCN = B.SSAID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BLDGNO.ROADBLDGNOID, BLDGNAME.ROADBLDGNAMEID, CASE BLDGNO.UGRDYN WHEN '0' THEN '지상' WHEN '1' THEN '지하' ELSE '공중' END AS UGRDDESC, NVL(BJDONG.LINAME, BJDONG.DONGNAME) AS DONGNAME, BJDONG.LINAME, ROAD.BROADNAME || ' ' || CASE WHEN NVL(ROAD.MIDNAME, '') > '' THEN ROAD.MIDNAME || ' ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN NVL(ROAD.BMASNAME, '') > '' THEN ROAD.BMASNAME || ' ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN NVL(ROAD.BMASNAME, '') > '' THEN ROAD.BMASNAME || ' ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN BJDONG.LINAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE BJDONG.DONGNAME || ' ' END || ROAD.ROADNAME AS ROADFULLNAME, ROAD.BROADNAME || ' ' || CASE WHEN NVL(ROAD.MIDNAME, '') > '' THEN ROAD.MIDNAME || ' ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN NVL(ROAD.BMASNAME, '') > '' THEN ROAD.BMASNAME || ' ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN BJDONG.LINAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE BJDONG.DONGNAME || ' ' END || ROAD.ROADNAME || ' ' || BLDGNO.BLDGMAINNO || CASE WHEN BLDGNO.BLDGSUBNO > 0 THEN '-' || BLDGNO.BLDGSUBNO ELSE ' ' END AS ROADADDRTEXT, ROAD.ROADNAME || ' ' || BLDGNO.BLDGMAINNO || CASE WHEN BLDGNO.BLDGSUBNO > 0 THEN '-' || BLDGNO.BLDGSUBNO ELSE ' ' END AS ROADADDRSUBTEXT, NZIP.zipcode FROM bif.tb_ROADBLDGNAME BLDGNAME INNER JOIN bif.tb_ROADBLDGNO BLDGNO ON BLDGNAME.ROADBLDGNOID = BLDGNO.ROADBLDGNOID INNER JOIN bif.tb_ROADADDR ROAD ON BLDGNO.ROADNAMEID = ROAD.ROADNAMEID INNER JOIN bif.tb_JIBUNDONG BJDONG ON BLDGNO.DONGCODE = BJDONG.DONGCODE INNER JOIN bif.tb_newzipcode NZIP ON NZIP.bldgmgmtid = BLDGNAME.bldgmgmtno ) D ON D.ROADBLDGNAMEID = C.ROADBLDGNAMEID AND D.ROADBLDGNOID = C.ROADBLDGNOID WHERE A.NWHOIS_SEQ = #{nwhoisSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
